title: agentflow artifact envelope
description: Short routing receipt the orchestrator reads INSTEAD of the long payload. One envelope per artifact, named <payload-stem>.envelope.json. content_sha256 binds it to the payload so drift is caught by validate-envelope.

artifact_path.description: Path to the long payload (relative to the tool root). The specialized agent reads THIS; the orchestrator does not.

verdict.description: short outcome the router keys on (e.g. FAIL, CODEX_REQUIRED, APPROVE, IMPLEMENTED, PASS)

summary_for_router.description: ONE short line, routing-only — NOT a business summary

content_sha256.description: sha256 of the payload bytes; validate-envelope re-hashes and rejects on mismatch
